name: data-table
description: Signal-driven data table with client/server sort, filter, pagination, multi-selection, expandable rows, and CSS content-visibility row containment for large datasets

meta.name: DataTable
meta.description: Signal-driven data table with client/server sort, filter, pagination, multi-selection, expandable rows, and CSS content-visibility row containment for large datasets

props.name: columns
props.description: The column definitions describing each table column.

props.name: rows
props.description: Number of visible text rows.

props.name: getRowId
props.description: Returns a stable unique id for a row.

props.name: sort
props.description: The controlled sort state.

props.name: defaultSort
props.description: The initial sort state when uncontrolled.

props.name: sortMode
props.description: Whether sorting is handled client-side or by the server ('client' | 'server').

props.name: onSortChange
props.description: Called with the new sort state when it changes.

props.name: searchable
props.description: When true, shows a search/filter input.

props.name: pagination
props.description: Pagination configuration (page size and options).

props.name: selection
props.description: Row-selection configuration (mode and selected ids).
props.type: { mode: 'single' | 'multi'; selected?: string[]; onChange?: (ids: string[]) => void }

props.name: batchActions
props.description: Actions applied to the currently selected rows.

props.name: renderExpandedRow
props.description: Renders the expanded content for a row.

props.name: density
props.description: Row density — 'compact', 'normal', or 'relaxed'.

props.name: zebra
props.description: When true, applies alternating row striping.

props.name: stickyHeader
props.description: When true, the header stays fixed while the body scrolls.

props.name: loading
props.description: When true, shows a loading state.

props.name: emptyState
props.description: Content shown when there are no rows.

props.name: title
props.description: Title text for the component.

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting description text.

props.name: labels
props.description: Overrides for the component’s user-visible strings (i18n).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Basic table
examples.code:
<DataTable
  columns={[
    { key: 'name', header: 'Name', sortable: true },
    { key: 'role', header: 'Role' },
  ]}
  rows={[
    { name: 'Alice', role: 'Engineer' },
    { name: 'Bob', role: 'Designer' },
  ]}
  getRowId={(r) => r.name}
/>

examples.title: Full-featured: selection, pagination, search
examples.code:
<DataTable
  columns={columns}
  rows={rows}
  getRowId={(r) => r.id}
  searchable
  pagination={{ pageSize: 10, pageSizeOptions: [10, 25, 50] }}
  selection={{ mode: 'multi', onChange: setSelected }}
  batchActions={[{ label: 'Delete', onClick: deleteRows }]}
  stickyHeader
  zebra
/>

whenToUse: Displaying tabular data with columns the user sorts, filters, or pages through
Selecting rows for batch actions across a dataset
Rendering large datasets that benefit from row containment and server-side sort/paging
whenNotToUse: A simple static list of items — use List
Layout grids of cards or media — use a Card grid, not a data table

antiPatterns.bad: Using DataTable for two columns of label/value pairs
antiPatterns.good: A description list or a small Card with Stat/Text
antiPatterns.why: The full table machinery (sort, paging, selection) is overhead when there is no dataset to operate on

related.name: Pagination
related.reason: DataTable embeds pagination controls for paged data

related.name: EmptyState
related.reason: Render an EmptyState via the emptyState prop when there are no rows

intent.a11yRationale: Built on a native <table> with proper header semantics; sortable headers expose sort state, selection uses real checkboxes, and arrow-key navigation follows the grid pattern so keyboard users can traverse cells

flexibility.note: Choose client/server sort and density to fit data size and layout
All surfaces, borders, and spacing must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens
